arts.ttl: Arne Slot unlocks £135m Liverpool masterplan as Darwin Nunez reaction speaks volumes
arts.sum: Theo Squires analysis of Liverpool's 2-0 Champions League win over Bologna at Anfield

arts.ttl: Alisson sends clear message to Arne Slot and new Liverpool signing Giorgi Marmadashvili
arts.sum: Liverpool star Alisson celebrated his 32nd birthday with a 2-0 win over Bologna in the Champions League, with the goalkeeper producing a fine performance to keep a clean sheet

arts.ttl: Vincenzo Italiano Proud of Bologna Performance Against Liverpool
arts.sum: Bologna slipped to a 2-0 defeat to Liverpool in only their second UEFA Champions League outing in over 60 years last night. However, head coach Vincenzo Italiano was proud of his team, insisting they left Merseyside with 'our heads held high.' The post Vincenzo Italiano Proud of Bologna Performance Against Liverpool appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Bologna boss makes Anfield atmosphere admission after Champions League loss to Liverpool
arts.sum: Bologna manager Vincenzo Italiano has had his say on the Anfield atmosphere after his side's 2-0 Champions League defeat to Liverpool

arts.ttl: Arne Slot namechecks Jurgen Klopp as he reacts to breaking Liverpool record
arts.sum: Arne Slot became the first Liverpool manager to win eight of their first nine games in charge after his in-form side beat Bologna 2-0 in the Champions League at Anfield

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah sets new Champions League record with stunning strike in Liverpool's victory over Bologna at Anfield
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah set a new Champions League record as he scored an excellent goal in Liverpool's 2-0 win at home to Bologna.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister makes honest assessment on Liverpool under Arne Slot
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister scored as Liverpool beat Bologna 2-0 in the Champions League on Wednesday and post-match, the midfielder discussed their progress under Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Arne Slot not satisfied despite record-setting start to life at Liverpool
arts.sum: The Dutch manager is the first manager to win eight of his first nine matches in charge of the Reds.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot lining up shock £42m bid for Champions League star?
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly enter the race to sign a 22-year-old attacker who has starred in the Champions League this season.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Liverpool history with feat even Jurgen Klopp couldn't manage - but still believes Reds can improve after easing past Bologna
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE AT ANFIELD: Arne Slot became the first Liverpool manager in history to win eight of his first nine games, but says his team must improve if they are to kick on this season.
